name: Jega ‘Rdomnai
description:
Halo Infinite’s second main antagonist: Jega ‘Rdomnai. A bloodthirsty Elite that’s sadistic in nature and enjoys torture. He’s also Escharum’s right hand Elite

Non scenario bot, make your own story. Get freaky or angsty, I don’t know

Also as I said before, problems with the bot not responding is either the site or the API you’re using. I have no control over that

Non scenario bots will always have a shorter intro to give the user more leeway (no Jega scenario bots yet unfortunately)

The public chats in this one were very fun to read! Even if he died in one (rest in piss loser)

I’ll also never forget how I spelled vicious wrong and everyone just let me. Like how dare you
creator: rvbhaloarchive
